title: Precious Days
description: A solo performance by Ami Oprenova of 'Precious Days' — the title track from her debut album recorded with Daniele Ciuffreda.

title: Cry Me a River — Coco 'n' the Fellas
description: Ami Oprenova and Coco 'n' the Fellas perform the classic Arthur Hamilton standard with their signature gypsy jazz style.

title: Honeysuckle Rose — Live in Sofia
description: Live performance of the Fats Waller classic recorded in Sofia, Bulgaria.

title: King of the Swingers — Live at Primo Bar
description: Coco 'n' the Fellas bring the house down with a swinging live rendition at Primo Bar, London.

title: Not Enough Coffee — Coco 'n' the Fellas
description: An original number full of groove and personality from Ami Oprenova and Coco 'n' the Fellas.

title: Everybody's Song (Kenny Wheeler) — Coco 'n' the Fellas
description: Coco 'n' the Fellas perform Kenny Wheeler's 'Everybody's Song', showcasing the band's lyrical jazz sensibility.

title: A Little Bit of Funky Summertime — Coco 'n' the Fellas
description: A funky, sun-drenched take on Summertime that blends gypsy swing with soulful jazz improvisation.
